015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import java.lang.annotation.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
024
025/**
026 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link UrlEncoding @UrlEncoding} annotation.
027 *
028 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
029 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/UrlEncodingBasics">URL-Encoding Basics</a>
030 * </ul>
031 */
032public class UrlEncodingAnnotation {
033
034   /**
035    * Prevents instantiation.
036    */
037   private UrlEncodingAnnotation() {}
038   /**
039    * Builder class.
040    *
041    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042    *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#annotations(Annotation...)}
043    * </ul>
044    */
045   public static class Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder {
046
047      private String[] description = {};
048      private boolean expandedParams;
049
050      /**
051       * Constructor.
052       */
053      protected Builder() {
054         super(UrlEncoding.class);
055      }
056
057      /**
058       * Instantiates a new {@link UrlEncoding @UrlEncoding} object initialized with this builder.
059       *
060       * @return A new {@link UrlEncoding @UrlEncoding} object.
061       */
062      public UrlEncoding build() {
063         return new Object(this);
064      }
065
066      /**
067       * Sets the description property on this annotation.
068       *
069       * @param value The new value for this property.
070       * @return This object.
071       */
072      public Builder description(String...value) {
073         description = value;
074         return this;
075      }
076
077      /**
078       * Sets the {@link UrlEncoding#expandedParams} property on this annotation.
079       *
080       * @param value The new value for this property.
081       * @return This object.
082       */
083      public Builder expandedParams(boolean value) {
084         expandedParams = value;
085         return this;
086      }
087
088   }
089
090   @SuppressWarnings({
091      "java:S2160" // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
092   })
093   private static class Object extends AnnotationObject implements UrlEncoding {
094
095      private final String[] description;
096      private final boolean expandedParams;
097
098      Object(UrlEncodingAnnotation.Builder b) {
099         super(b);
100         description = copyOf(b.description);
101         expandedParams = b.expandedParams;
102      }
103
104      @Override /* Overridden from UrlEncoding */
105      public boolean expandedParams() {
106         return expandedParams;
107      }
108
109      @Override /* Overridden from annotation */
110      public String[] description() {
111         return description;
112      }
113   }
114
115   /** Default value */
116   public static final UrlEncoding DEFAULT = create().build();
117
118   /**
119    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
120    *
121    * @return A new builder object.
122    */
123   public static Builder create() {
124      return new Builder();
125   }
126}
